response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience and deep technical curiosity, with notable contributions to tooling and open-source projects, but lacks explicit, recent experience with Java/Kotlin IDE tooling, Spring ecosystem, or JVM internals — core requirements for this role. His Java exposure is minimal and dated, and his focus has been on TypeScript, DLang, and web systems, making his fit uncertain without further exploration.
strengths: Proven track record in developer tooling and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Strong background in low-latency systems, CI/CD, and infrastructure (Docker, GitLab, CI servers)
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops, talks, and teaching experience
concerns: Minimal recent or demonstrable experience with Java/Kotlin IDE internals or JVM tooling
No clear evidence of working with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or enterprise application servers
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang; Java appears only as a minor, older component
